title: Mod Prelude
description: Mod Prelude - Revive an Ancient Flora & Fauna.
body:
### Mod Prelude

This mod is a spiritual successor os the original [Mod Prelude](https://github.com/rexbr3615/modprelude), The players can revive dinossaurs and other prehistoric creatures.

You can use this mod in modpacks.

### 🦖 Prelude
In the prelude mod you will be able to revive ancient fauna and flora that were extinct thousands of years ago, you will be able to extract the DNA of these animals and plants, and revive them using specific tools for this

### 🌱 Fauna And Flora

Actually the mod have 1 creature implemented and 3 in production.


See the complete description in the other platform [Here!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mod-prelude)
